zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Heathcote於1575年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親Francis Heathcote26歲，母親Jane Renshawe17歲。她於1602年3月9日與Lord John Ragsdale在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1643年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾享年68歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Heathcote于1575年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾时，她的父亲Francis Heathcote26岁，母亲Jane Renshawe17岁。她于1602年3月9日与Lord John Ragsdale在英国諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1643年在英国英格兰德比夏爾享年68岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Heathcote
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Heathcote in Hartington (Derbyshire), Heathcote in Warwick (Warwickshire), or Heathcote Farm in Wasperton (Warwickshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’. In Yorkshire, this name is pronounced Hethkett.

variants.name: Hathcoat
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Heathcote  .

variants.name: Heathcott
meanings: English (Derbyshire and Lancashire): variant of   Heathcote  .

variants.name: Heathcoat
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Heathcote  .

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Heathcote was born in 1575, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Francis Heathcote, was 26 and her mother, Jane Renshawe, was 17. She married Lord John Ragsdale on 9 March 1602, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1643, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Heathcote est née en 1575, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Francis Heathcote, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane Renshawe, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Lord John Ragsdale le 9 mars 1602, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1643, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Heathcote 1575 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Francis Heathcote 26 und ihre Mutter Jane Renshawe 17. Sie hat am 9. März 1602 in Nottinghamshire, England Lord John Ragsdale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1643 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Heathcote è nata il nel 1575 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Francis Heathcote, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Jane Renshawe, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Lord John Ragsdale il 9 marzo 1602, nel Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1643, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Heathcoteが1575年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Francis Heathcoteは26歳，母Jane Renshaweは17歳であった。1602年3月9日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでLord John Ragsdaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1643年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで68歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.Henrico, Colony of Virginia, British Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Heathcote(이)가 1575년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Francis Heathcote(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Renshawe(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1602년 3월 9일 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Lord John Ragsdale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1643년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에 묻혔다.

pt.Henrico, Va: Henrico, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Heathcote nasceu em 1575, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Francis Heathcote, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jane Renshawe, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord John Ragsdale em 9 de março de 1602, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1643, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Henrico, Va: Henrico, Virginia, Statele Unite ale Americii

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Heathcote родилась в 1575 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Francis Heathcote было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Renshawe, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord John Ragsdale 9 марта 1602 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1643 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

sm.Henrico, Va: Henrico, Virginia, Iunaite Setete o Amerika

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Heathcote nació en 1575, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Francis Heathcote, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jane Renshawe, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Lord John Ragsdale el 9 de marzo de 1602, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1643, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
